name: Maryam Al-Mansour
whatsapp_message: مرحبا مريم 👋 نلاحظ أنك تحضري للامتحان القادم بعد 6 أيام، وأداؤك في آخر اختبار كان 63 درجة. نريد أن نساعدك للوصول لنتائج أفضل - هل تحتاجين لدعم إضافي أو توضيح أي مواضيع؟
action: Call or message Maryam today to conduct a needs assessment and offer targeted tutoring support before her quiz in 6 days.
reasoning: Maryam has never been contacted by a facilitator despite having high risk status and a below-passing quiz score (63/100). With 6 days until the next quiz and perfect attendance, immediate intervention can help her improve before reassessment.
